paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.65, with a change of 8.66 percent compared to the prior close, and a change of -25.86 percent over a window of 21 sessions. The price is as of July 21, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with a recent headline from TradingView announcing Fermi Inc.'s second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date. The company will host an earnings call on August 13, 2026. Additionally, there is one new social post in the last 24 hours, mentioning the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, and an 8-K form announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed, and 17 proxy solicitation filings.
